title: 2017-2021 Batch Placements
content: 2017-2021 Batch Placements Placement Highlights-JUIT Solan B.Tech–2021 4.8 LPA Mean Salary 4.0 LPA Median Salary 30.0 LPA Highest Salary by Amazon 17.5 LPA 2nd Highest Salary by Amazon (Non Tech) 9.5 LPA 3rd Highest Salary by Zscaler PLACEMENT STATUS : JUIT Solan Batch 2017-21 as on 31/Jan/2022 PLACEMENT STATUS : JUIT, SOLAN 2017-21 Branch Total Eligible Students No. of Absolute Offers % of Absolute Offers No. of Total Offers % of Total Offers CSE 124 124 100% 214 173% ECE 45 45 100% 59 131% IT 26 24 92% 41 158% BT/BI 19 15 79% 17 89% CIVIL 15 8 53% 9 60% Total 229 216 94% 340 148% Key Recruiters: Click Labs Infosys TT Consultants Cogizant Kony Labs UniMrkt Coviam Technologies Kuliza Wep Digital Edoofa Kwench Wipro Ericsson Nineleaps Yamaha Motor Sol FICO NTT Data ZS Associates Gemalto Decision Point Zscaler Genpact Root Analysis Zycus Grappus RTDS Zyla Healthcare Hackwithinfi Sap labs IDS Infotech Hashdin SRM Contractors Eckovation HCL Stellarix Consultancy Extramarks India Lends The Smart Cube Collagedunia IndiaMart TresVista Ultratech Mountblue Bright Petroleum Growman Research Group Note:- Significant number of students who have opted for higher studies in India and abroad through GATE and other competitive examinations are removed from the list of total eligible students. For any query please write to pankaj.kumar@juit.ac.in
